question: Is the wealth concentration branch now mature enough to count as a comparative non-climate proving-ground, and what would it still need before method-shaping status is justified?

expected_outputs.description: A branch maturity or structure judgment update
A loop-run update or maturity assessment

notes: Judged wealth concentration as a Level 3 comparative proving-ground branch: clearly portable and internally comparative, but not yet method-shaping at the level of the climate branches.

branch_context.structure_type: hybrid: correlation/transmission failure + design/rule conflict under volatility
